title: The Sleeping Colossus
description: A monumental figure rests among snowbound peaks while islands drift overhead. First encounter of the visit.

title: Portrait of the Captain
description: A painted captain and his companion, framed twice over — a painting of a painting.

title: Vigil at the Frozen Sea
description: Wings folded against the cold, a figure watches a ring of light rise over the ice. The film pauses longest here.

title: The Congregation
description: A gathering rendered pixel by pixel — every one of them preserved exactly.

title: Three at Golden Hour
description: The hero wall. Three companions at sundown — and at the threshold, the museum borrows their golden light.
